description: Clean up the manuscript submission tracking data for a freelance writer. Standardize status values, fix date formats, calculate response times, and generate publication statistics.

natural_language.prompt: You are a freelance writer who has been tracking manuscript submissions in a spreadsheet. The data has become messy over time with inconsistent status values and date formats. Clean up the data, calculate response times, and create a summary showing which publications have the best acceptance rates and fastest response times.
